title: M1A Source-Lock Certificate Fragment v1.2 Extension
description: M1A v1.2 source-lock extension with optional upstream M0 training-provenance reference. This schema is intentionally focused on v1.2 policy fields; v1 structural source-lock fields remain governed by source-lock.v1.json.

upstream_training_provenance_ref.description: Reference to an M0 training-provenance certificate for this source-locked artifact. Null is permitted only when non_claims explicitly states that no upstream provenance certificate exists.
